evals.prompt: Audit the AWS API Gateway REST API named MyService-Public-PROD for our quarterly compliance review. Generate per-path documentation (methods, authorizers, integrations) plus a security CSV with the standard columns (api, method, path, is_authorized, authorization_type, authorizer_name, api_key, whitelist, endpoint_url). Apply any whitelist files in ./whitelists/. Drop everything under ./reports/audit-myservice-prod/.
evals.expected_output: Per-path Markdown tree under ./reports/audit-myservice-prod/MyService-Public-PROD/ plus a CSV with the 9 standard columns and one row per non-OPTIONS method.

assertions.text: Output dir contains a per-API folder for MyService-Public-PROD
An INDEX.md file exists at the API folder root
A paths/ subfolder exists with at least 1 per-path Markdown file
A CSV security report file exists somewhere under the output dir
CSV excludes OPTIONS rows (no row has method=OPTIONS)
All CSV rows have api column set to MyService-Public-PROD
At least one per-path Markdown file mentions an integration URI containing ${stageVariables}

evals.prompt: Document the PROD environment of the AWS API Gateway REST API named MyOtherService-Public so a new teammate can browse the endpoints by path without opening the AWS console. Output the docs to ./reports/docs-myotherservice-prod/. No security CSV is needed.
evals.expected_output: Hierarchical Markdown tree under ./reports/docs-myotherservice-prod/MyOtherService-Public-PROD/ with INDEX.md plus paths/*.md. No CSV file expected.

assertions.text: Output dir contains a per-API folder for MyOtherService-Public-PROD
An INDEX.md file exists at the API folder root
A paths/ subfolder exists with at least 1 per-path Markdown file
INDEX.md links to per-path Markdown files (relative links to paths/*.md)
At least one per-path MD includes an integration URI
At least one per-path MD shows authorization information for at least one method
No CSV file exists in the output (user explicitly said no CSV)
Output is per-path (each resource has its own MD), not one giant file dumping everything
